title: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 31, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Peter Andrew - Vice President, Financial Planning and Analyst and Investor Relations David Goeckeler - Chief Executive Officer Wissam Jabre - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Joseph Moore - Morgan Stanley C.J. Muse - Evercore ISI Tom O'Malley - Barclays Krish Sankar - Cowen Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Shannon Cross - Credit Suisse Timothy Arcuri - UBS Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Karl Ackerman - BNP Paribas Operator Good afternoon, and thank you for standing by.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Reports Q4 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: Western Digital (WDC) came out with a quarterly loss of $1.98 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $2. This compares to earnings of $1.78 per share a year ago.

title: Western Digital Reports Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) today reported fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal year 2023 financial results. “Throughout the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal year, Western Digital continued to optimize our operations and successfully execute our innovative product roadmap, priming ourselves for greater profitability when demand rebounds across hard drives and flash. title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: Shares of SoFi Networks surged ahead of its earnings report and trucking company Yellow shut down operations as it prepares for bankruptcy. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: Western Digital (WDC) to Post Q4 Earnings: Key Factors to Note
text: Western Digital's (WDC) fiscal fourth-quarter performance is likely to have been affected by a challenging macro environment and inventory corrections by customers.

title: Western Digital to Announce Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results on July 31, 2023
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC) plans to announce its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2023 financial results after the market closes on Monday, July 31, 2023. The investment community conference call to discuss these results will be held that day at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern.
